notes: M2/S2-core-config-db-security completed locally and remains intentionally uncommitted for review.
M3/S3-cli-mock-pipeline completed locally and remains intentionally uncommitted for review.
M10/S10-alpha-release is the current approved slice; canonical details live in docs/product/execution-plan.md.
Do not create .env; use env-only secrets only.
Cloudflare fixture mode uses STACKSPEND_CLOUDFLARE_FIXTURE with fake local payloads only.
Slack delivery uses SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL only when stackspend report daily --lang ko --send slack is requested.
Slack tests must use injectable transport and must not call live Slack.
Local dashboard reads normalized SQLite snapshots and returns a safe empty state when the database is missing.
Docker and Compose are local self-host/dev review paths only and must not embed secrets.
Do not persist raw provider payloads.
